title: rosa dumalis f. cariotii
intro: Rosa dumalis f. cariotii, also known as the Cariot's rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa dumalis plant, which is a type of wild rose native to the Pyrenees mountains. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis f. cariotii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Rosa dumalis f. cariotii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various ailments, including sore throats, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
